member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Activation.PersistAgentProfile.AgentProfilePersistActivity
member.summary:
Fan-out writes all per-agent activation outputs to real-estate-star/{agentId}/. Also creates the leads/ and leads/consent/ subdirectories. Then delegates to IAgentConfigService to generate account.json + content.json.
Lead data isolation: lead files fan-out to Agent Drive + Platform Blob ONLY — never to Account Drive (brokerage folder).

Fan-out writes all per-agent activation outputs to real-estate-star/{agentId}/. Also creates the leads/ and leads/consent/ subdirectories. Then delegates to IAgentConfigService to generate account.json + content.json.
Lead data isolation: lead files fan-out to Agent Drive + Platform Blob ONLY — never to Account Drive (brokerage folder).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Activation.PersistAgentProfile.AgentProfilePersistActivity.VerifyDriveSyncAsync(System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Spot-checks a representative file to confirm the Agent Drive tier received the write. Logs an ERROR if the file is missing — indicates the Drive tier silently failed.
